task_completion.description: Select or open the record for patient John Zenon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GNU Health interface should display 'John Zenon' as the active patient in the header, patient list, or evaluation form.

task_completion.description: Document the toxicological diagnosis using the correct ICD-10 code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A diagnosis or condition entry containing ICD-10 code 'T54.2', 'T54', or 'T22' (toxic effects of corrosives or upper limb burns) should be visible in the patient's record.

task_completion.description: Record a clinical evaluation noting acute pain and tachycardia.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An evaluation or encounter form should show text indicating 'acute pain' and a Heart Rate (HR) field filled with a value of 100 or greater.
A prescription or medication order screen should display 'Calcium Gluconate' (or 'Calcium Gluconate 2.5% Gel') for the patient.

task_completion.description: Order at least two laboratory tests, including Calcium or CMP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A lab order or request screen should show at least two tests ordered, with at least one being 'Calcium', 'CA', or 'CMP'.

task_completion.description: Schedule a wound reassessment appointment for one day from today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An appointment scheduling screen should show a follow-up appointment booked for exactly one day after the current system date.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GNU Health GUI rather than using terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GNU Health graphical interface being navigated and filled out, without terminal windows executing database queries.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual GNU Health application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard GNU Health layout, menus, and forms should be visible, rather than a text editor or a mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent entered data into the appropriate specific fields rather than dumping all information into a single text box.
integrity.visual_evidence: Information should be distributed across the correct modules (Diagnoses, Prescriptions, Lab, Appointments) and specific fields (e.g., Heart Rate field for tachycardia).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target patient: John Zenon. Required diagnosis: ICD-10 T54.x or T22.x. Required prescription: Calcium Gluconate. Required lab tests: Minimum 2 orders, including Calcium or CMP. Follow-up appointment: Exactly 1 day from the current system date. Heart rate must be >= 100 bpm.
